Actions.Text: ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.632

Title: Relates to the compensation, benefits and other terms and conditions of employment of certain state officers and employees; repealer
Summary: Relates to the compensation, benefits and other terms and conditions of employment of certain state officers and employees; implements the agreements between the state and the public employees federation.
LawCode: Rpld §130 sub 1 ¶c sub¶¶ 1 - 3, amd §130, Civ Serv L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the civil service law, in relation to compensation, benefits and other terms and conditions of employment of certain state officers and employees; and in relation to implementing agreements between the state and an employee organization; to repeal certain provisions of the civil service law relating thereto; and making an appropriation for the purpose of effectuating certain provisions therefor
